pi_items.source: verifier.py expects sequential IDs starting at expected_id = 1001 + i
setup_task.ps1 is completely missing from the directory, meaning no data is generated

privileged_info_summary: The task strictly requires the agent to output a renumbered list of exactly 45 points, starting sequentially at 1001, to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\renumbered_points.txt. However, the task is critically defective because the required setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 scripts are entirely absent from the task directory. Consequently, the prerequisite survey_points.txt file is never created, ground_truth.json is never generated, and task_result.json is never produced, rendering the task programmatically unscorable as the verifier will perpetually fail on execution.
